about: I am Tharun Budidha, a Computer Science and Engineering  Final year student at RGUKT Basar, with a GPA of 8.1. I am passionate about frontend development and enjoy working on data structures and problem-solving.I have hands-on experience with React, Node.js, Express.js, and MongoDB, and continuously seek to improve my skills through personal projects and coding challenges. I am ready to contribute to a new organization, bringing my enthusiasm for learning and growing in dynamic, impactful projects
